stories.headline: PA PUC votes 5-0 to advance large-load tariff framework for data centers
stories.summary: Chairman Steve DeFrank's amended final order, applying to customers over 50 MW (or 100 MW aggregate), directs EDCs toward a transparent cost-causation model so existing residential and small-business ratepayers don't subsidize speculative data-center build-out — a revised final order is due in coming days.

stories.headline: FirstEnergy CEO Tierney calls PJM's backstop auction design 'flawed'
stories.summary: On Wednesday's earnings call Brian Tierney said power-plant developers should contract directly with end-use data-center customers instead of going through PJM, and large loads should pay the utility for upgrades — pushback as PJM finalizes its Reliability Backstop Procurement.

stories.headline: Gas leads PJM's reopened queue at 106 GW of 220 GW total
stories.summary: PJM's first reformed-queue cycle drew 811 projects: 105.8 GW gas, 66.5 GW storage, 17.9 GW nuclear, 14.8 GW solar — a generation-mix signal directly relevant to Allegheny's PJM stake and 26/27 capacity-market dynamics.

stories.headline: Meta deal pushes Entergy's 4-year capital plan to $57B
stories.summary: Entergy disclosed a 30% jump in its capex plan to $57 billion through 2029, driven largely by a hyperscale Meta data-center commitment — another data point as PJM-region utilities and IPPs negotiate similar large-load PPAs.

stories.headline: NYT poll: voter hostility to data centers is bipartisan
stories.summary: New polling shows liberals and conservatives have both soured on data-center siting; the political backlash is shaping how PA, NJ, Virginia and Texas regulators write large-load tariffs and grid-cost-allocation rules.

stories.headline: House clears farm bill 224-200 capping 'hell of a week' for Johnson
stories.summary: Speaker Johnson muscled through FISA Section 702 (45-day patch), ended a 75-day DHS shutdown, passed the farm bill 224-200 and adopted the Senate budget resolution; reconciliation work resumes the week of May 11 with a June 1 Trump deadline.

stories.headline: White House declares Iran war 'terminated' as 60-day War Powers clock expires
stories.summary: An administration official said an April 7 ceasefire reset the War Powers Resolution clock; Sen. Susan Collins broke with the GOP on Thursday's war-powers vote, warning the 60-day requirement is 'not a suggestion.'

stories.headline: Schumer's primary slump deepens as Mills cedes Maine to Platner
stories.summary: Sen. Martin Heinrich publicly urged Schumer and the DSCC to pull back from contested Iowa (June 2) and Michigan (Aug. 4) primaries after Maine Gov. Janet Mills exited; Schumer's pick Stevens trails McMorrow in Michigan polling.

stories.headline: Senate unanimously bans members and staff from prediction-market bets
stories.summary: Sen. Bernie Moreno's bill, drawing rare bipartisan praise from Schumer, prohibits congressional members and staff from wagering on platforms like Polymarket after a string of insider-trading concerns.

stories.headline: Lt. Gov. Davis tells PA Teamsters Pennsylvania 'will never' be right-to-work
stories.summary: Speaking at the PA Conference of Teamsters in Hershey, Lt. Gov. Austin Davis pledged a Shapiro-Davis second term would block right-to-work, sharpening labor's role as the November contest takes shape against Garrity.

stories.headline: McCormick (R-Pa.) and Gillibrand (D-N.Y.) introduce prediction-markets bill
stories.summary: The bipartisan Senate measure would update federal commodities regulation as the Trump administration pushes CFTC jurisdiction over event-contract platforms — a notable McCormick play on a fast-moving financial-tech file.

stories.headline: Fetterman tells DHS Secretary Mullin he opposes ICE detention sites in Schuylkill, Berks
stories.summary: Sen. John Fetterman reiterated to new DHS Secretary Markwayne Mullin his opposition to opening ICE detention facilities in Schuylkill and Berks counties, repeating the position he gave former Secretary Kristi Noem.

stories.headline: Allentown HD-22 Dem primary exposes party rift: Tiburcio vs. Gerlach
stories.summary: State Rep. Ana Tiburcio, who won February's special, faces progressive Allentown councilmember Ce-Ce Gerlach in a May 19 primary that's become a proxy fight between Democratic establishment and the progressive wing in Lehigh Valley.

stories.headline: Cardinals sweep Pirates with 10-5 rout; Skenes falls to 0-5 vs. St. Louis
stories.summary: JJ Wetherholt led off with a homer off Paul Skenes and Jordan Walker added an early shot as St. Louis completed a four-game sweep at PNC; Skenes (4-2) gave up five runs, four earned, in five innings. Pirates open Cincinnati series tonight.

stories.headline: Penguins eliminated by Flyers in Game 6 OT, 1-0
stories.summary: Cam York's overtime goal Wednesday ended Pittsburgh's first-round series 4-2 after Arturs Silovs and Ivan Vladar dueled scoreless through 60 minutes; Philadelphia opens Round 2 at Carolina tomorrow.

stories.headline: Steelers' 10-pick draft class led by Iheanachor (OT), Bernard (WR), Allar (QB)
stories.summary: Pittsburgh took Arizona State OT Max Iheanachor at No. 21, traded up for Alabama WR Germie Bernard at No. 47, and grabbed Penn State QB Drew Allar in the third round — Omar Khan's first draft for new HC Mike McCarthy.
